contains.description:
Filter for notebooks that match a provided filter.
                Each match pair is separated by a colon,
                multiple match pairs can be sent separated by a space or a comma

created_by.description: The UUID of the Notebook's creator

date_from.description: Filter for notebooks created after this date & time

date_to.description: Filter for notebooks created before this date & time

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

user.description: If any value is provided for this parameter, return notebooks created by the logged in user.
